items.title: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
items.dek: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.body: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Headscarf with a beret: Muslim designers showcase floral dresses and boxy streetwear in Paris
items.dek: Some young attendees say the event demonstrated a more inclusive French culture taking shape.
items.body: Some young attendees say the event demonstrated a more inclusive French culture taking shape.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US soldier charged after winning $400,000 betting on removal of Maduro
items.dek: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket on the basis of classified information, the justice department says.
items.body: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket on the basis of classified information, the justice department says.
